raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits the claim-evidence linkage, identifying that the reported ECE values contradict the claimed improvement and suggesting specific fixes.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations (e.g., Platt 1999/2000) and suggests additional relevant works, though it does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks uncertainty for claims about the nature of Guo et al. (2017) and the standard convention of ECE interpretation, providing a nuanced view of the evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the provided section, addressing all key issues without drifting into unrelated topics.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, explaining the source and rationale behind each suggestion."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits the claim-evidence linkage, identifying that the reported ECE values contradict the claimed improvement and suggesting specific fixes.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations (e.g., Platt 1999/2000) and suggests additional relevant works, though it does not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks uncertainty for claims about the nature of Guo et al. (2017) and the standard convention of ECE interpretation, providing a nuanced view of the evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the provided section, addressing all key issues without drifting into unrelated topics.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues in the original text that could lead to downstream harm if not addressed.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, explaining the source and rationale behind each suggestion.
